ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Current coach of the team */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "last_season_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the last season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Names of the referees who officiated the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "projected_points" REAL /* Projected fantasy points */,
  "projected_points_draftkings" REAL /* Projected fantasy points for DraftKings */,
  "projected_value" REAL /* Projected fantasy value */,
  "projected_value_draftkings" REAL /* Projected fantasy value for DraftKings */,
  "projected_points_fanduel" REAL /* Projected fantasy points for FanDuel */,
  "projected_points_yahoo" REAL /* Projected fantasy points for Yahoo */,
  "projected_points_fantasy_draft" REAL /* Projected fantasy points for FantasyDraft */,
  "projected_value_fanduel" REAL /* Projected fantasy value for FanDuel */,
  "projected_value_yahoo" REAL /* Projected fantasy value for Yahoo */,
  "projected_value_fantasy_draft" REAL /* Projected fantasy value for FantasyDraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_projections_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defensive_statistics" (
  "defense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defensive record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position being defended against */,
  "defense_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating against the position */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average points allowed per game against the position */,
  "rebounds_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds allowed per game against the position */,
  "assists_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average assists allowed per game against the position */,
  "steals_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average steals allowed per game against the position */,
  "blocks_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks allowed per game against the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defensive_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "subscription_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the user's subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points scored by the team in the current season */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_team_roster" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster record */,
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fantasy team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the player was added to the team */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the fantasy team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., starting, bench, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_roster_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_roster_fantasy_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("fantasy_team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("fantasy_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "predicted_winner" TEXT /* Predicted winner of the game */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "predicted_score_home" INTEGER /* Predicted score for the home team */,
  "predicted_score_away" INTEGER /* Predicted score for the away team */,
  "predicted_margin" INTEGER /* Predicted margin of victory */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Model used for the prediction (e.g., machine learning, expert analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date from the injury */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ankle, groin) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the salary is applicable */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary amount */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed portion of the salary */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any additional bonuses the player can earn */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., rookie, veteran) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "guaranteed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the contract is guaranteed */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "option_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contract has an option year (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of option (e.g., team, player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
